Services

What I do for you

Every solution is individually conceived — for maximum impact.

Speed & Conversion

Landing Pages

Lightning-fast Next.js landing pages that turn visitors into customers. Optimized for performance and maximum conversion.

  • Server-Side Rendering & Static Generation
  • Mobile-first, fully responsive
  • Optimized for maximum performance
  • Conversion-oriented UI/UX design
International

SEO & Visibility

Sustainable Google visibility — in Germany, Spain and worldwide. Technical SEO that works long-term.

  • Technical SEO audit & on-page optimization
  • International hreflang implementation
  • JSON-LD Structured Data & Rich Snippets
  • Google Search Console & Analytics
Setup & Workflow

Digital Consulting

Professional home office & streaming setups. OBS, lighting, audio — your digital presence at the highest level.

  • OBS Studio setup & scene configuration
  • Lighting concept for video & calls
  • Audio optimization & noise cancellation
  • Software workflow for creators & businesses
Our Values

Why Digital Solutions

Fast

Delivery times that impress. No long waiting periods.

Reliable

Commercial diligence in every project. Delivery as agreed.

Flexible

Individual solutions for individual requirements.

Quality Promise

Precision.Reliability.Diligence.

My commercial training in freight logistics and retail is no coincidence — it is the foundation of my work. I think in processes, deliver on time and communicate clearly.

No outsourcing. No agency overhead. You work directly with me — the expert who accompanies your project from start to finish.

„Kein Outsourcing. Kein Agentur-Overhead. Nur direkte, ehrliche und messbare Ergebnisse."
100%

Process

How we work

Transparent, structured and efficient — from the first idea to launch.

01

Analysis

We understand your goals, target audience and market — before writing a single line of code.

02

Strategy

Based on the analysis, we develop a clear digital strategy with measurable goals.

03

Design & Development

Your project takes shape — with state-of-the-art technologies, precise design and clean code.

04

Launch

On-time delivery, smooth launch and personal support after go-live.
